category_sources: GNU Mailutils Savannah summary describes mail libraries, clients, servers, POP3, IMAP4, Sieve, and mail utilities.
source_facts.description says "Swiss Army knife of email handling".
display_name_sources: GNU Mailutils manual and Savannah summary use the name GNU Mailutils.
source_facts.homepage is mailutils.org, the GNU Mailutils site.
docs_sources: Official GNU Mailutils manual documents GNU Mailutils 3.21 and its utilities, libraries, and configuration.
repo_sources: Official Mailutils download page links the development version to the Git repository at git.savannah.gnu.org.
Savannah project summary identifies GNU Mailutils as official GNU software with a Git repository.
tags_sources: GNU Mailutils project summary describes POP3 server, IMAP4 server, Sieve mail filter, POSIX mailx client, and other tools.
source_facts.executables lists mail, imap4d, pop3d, sieve, and related tools.
